name: UTG INC
summary: UTG, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated insurance holding company headquartered in Stanford, KY, whose principal subsidiary is Universal Guaranty Life Insurance Company (UG), an Ohio-domiciled life insurer licensed in 37 states. The Company's dominant business is individual life insurance, including servicing existing in-force business, acquiring other insurance companies, and administering life insurance for other entities. Products include whole life (Tradition) and a 5-year single premium annuity. UTG does not actively sell new policies currently.

products.name: Tradition
products.description: Fixed premium whole life insurance policy with level premiums payable for life, issue ages 0-75, minimum face amount $10,000 or coverage from $100 annual premium.

products.name: Annuity
products.description: 5-year single premium annuity product with guaranteed minimum rate of 1%, maximum 5% surrender charge, and 10% free withdrawal annually beginning year 2.

partnerships.description: UTG maintains its primary operating cash accounts with FSNB, an affiliate of UTG's largest shareholder and CEO Jesse T. Correll.
